sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_5e596f60ffd39e108e03ffffffffffb6
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl>f4297d032760221019ae55225cf6f28b</enforce_acl><http_method>GET</http_method><name>Established Connections</name><operation_script><![CDATA[(function process( /*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {

    function getScopeInformation(grObject, sysIds) {
        let res = [];
        grObject.addQuery('sys_id', 'IN', sysIds.join(','));
        grObject.query();

        while (grObject.next()) {
            let sysId = grObject.getValue('sys_id');
            let scopeName = grObject.getValue('name');
            res.push({
                sysId,
                scopeName
            });
        }
        return res;
    }

    const SYS_CREATED_ON_SORT = 'sys_created_on:desc';

    // read request queryParams
    const sourceType = String(request.queryParams.sourceType ?? 'all');
    const createdBy = (request.queryParams.createdBy && String(request.queryParams.createdBy) === 'me') ? gs.getUserName() : '';
    const connectionStatus = !!request.queryParams.connectionStatus && String(request.queryParams.connectionStatus) ? String(request.queryParams.connectionStatus) : '';
    const searchValue = request.queryParams.searchValue ? decodeURIComponent(request.queryParams.searchValue) : '';
    const start = Number(request.queryParams.start);
    const end = Number(request.queryParams.end);
    const connectionId = String(request.queryParams.connectionId ?? '');
    const sortOrder = String(request.queryParams.sortOrder ?? '');
    const selection = String(request.queryParams.selection ?? 'false').toLowerCase() === 'true';

    let sortFields = [];
    if (sortOrder && sortOrder.toLowerCase() !== SYS_CREATED_ON_SORT) {
        sortFields = [{
            name: "connection_label",
            isAscending: sortOrder.toLowerCase() !== 'desc'
        }];
    } else if (sortOrder && sortOrder.toLowerCase() === SYS_CREATED_ON_SORT) {
        sortFields = [{
            name: "sys_created_on",
            isAscending: false
        }];
    } else {
        // If label sorting isn't specified, default to sorting label in ascending order
        sortFields = [{
            name: "connection_label",
            isAscending: !sortOrder || sortOrder.toLowerCase() !== 'desc'
        }];
    }

    const filteringStatus = !!connectionStatus && connectionStatus !== 'all' ? connectionStatus : '';
    try {
        var appId = gs.getCurrentApplicationId();
        if (connectionId) {
            let connection = new ConnectionService().getConnectionById(connectionId);
			const isSameScope = connection["scope"] === appId;
            connection["currentScopeId"] = appId;
            connection["isSameScope"] = isSameScope;
            let scopeIds = [appId];
            if (!isSameScope) {
                scopeIds.push(connection["scope"]);
            }
            var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_scope');
            const scopeInformation = getScopeInformation(gr, scopeIds);
            for (let { sysId,scopeName } of scopeInformation) {
                if (isSameScope || sysId === connection["scope"]) {
                    connection["connScopeName"] = scopeName;
                }
                if (isSameScope || sysId === appId) {
                    connection["currSessionScopeName"] = scopeName;
                }
            }
            return connection;
        }

        var obj= new ConnectionService().getConnectionsBySearchParams(sourceType, createdBy, searchValue, start, end, sortFields, filteringStatus) || [];

		//Alectri Simulation.
        var simulatorUtil = new x_snc_alectri_zc_0.ZCCSimulatorUtil();
        for (var i = 0; i < obj['result'].length; i++) {
            if (simulatorUtil.checkIfAlectriConnection(obj['result'][i]['id'])) {
                var arr = JSON.parse(simulatorUtil.fetchAllDFtables(obj['result'][i]['id']));
                obj['result'][i]['numMappedTables'] = parseInt(arr.length);
				//mark the connection as simulated
				obj['result'][i]['name'] = obj['result'][i]['name'] + ' (S)';
            }
        }

return obj;

    } catch (error) {
        throw new sn_ws_err.BadRequestError('Data Fabric Hub: Unable to retrieve established connection(s). ' + error.message);
    }

})(request, response);]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/sn_data_fabric/data_fabric_ui/established-connections</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/established-connections</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-01-21 20:19:41</sys_created_on><sys_id>5e596f60ffd39e108e03ffffffffffb6</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Established Connections</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Workflow Data Fabric Hub" source="sn_data_fabric">15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Workflow Data Fabric Hub">15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_5e596f60ffd39e108e03ffffffffffb6</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>gurjot.joshi@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-29 14:26:46</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Data Fabric UI">48e07b5c430f5210920d8759bbb8f2d1</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_ebacfc37437f521093098759bbb8f2fd
sys_update_xml.payload:
trueapplication/json,application/xml,text/xmlfalsef4297d032760221019ae55225cf6f28bGETGet data fabric table respType.name === 'string')) { parsedResp.push({ name: 'string', label: 'String' }); } return parsedResp; } } catch (e) { return null; } }; function getAllCompatibleColumnTypes(columns) { let compatibleTypes = {}; let typeMetadata = {}; columns.forEach(column => { if (column.glideColumnType) { if (!compatibleTypes[column.glideColumnType]) { const types = getCompatibleTypesFor(column.glideColumnType); if (types) { compatibleTypes[column.glideColumnType] = types.map(type => type.name); types.forEach(type => { typeMetadata[type.name] = type; }); } } } if (column.remoteColumnType) { if (!compatibleTypes[column.remoteColumnType]) { const types = getCompatibleTypesFor(column.remoteColumnType); if (types) { compatibleTypes[column.remoteColumnType] = types.map(type => type.name); types.forEach(type => { typeMetadata[type.name] = type; }); } } } }); return {compatibleTypes, typeMetadata}; } const remoteSchema = request.queryParams.remoteSchema + ''; const remoteTable = request.queryParams.remoteTable + ''; const connectionId = String(request.queryParams.connectionId ?? ''); const dataFabricTableId = String(request.queryParams.dataFabricTableId ?? ''); const mode = request.queryParams.mode + ''; let appId = gs.getCurrentApplicationId(); let isSameScope = false; let tableScopeId; var sys_scope_gr = new GlideRecord('sys_scope'); var appName; var scope; var currSessionScopeName; if (dataFabricTableId !== '') { var sys_db_obj_gr = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object'); sys_db_obj_gr.addQuery("name", "=", dataFabricTableId); sys_db_obj_gr.query(); while (sys_db_obj_gr.next()) { tableScopeId = sys_db_obj_gr.getValue('sys_scope'); isSameScope = tableScopeId === appId; } var scopeSysIds = [appId]; if (!isSameScope) { scopeSysIds.push(tableScopeId); } const scopeInformation = getScopeInformation(sys_scope_gr, scopeSysIds); for (let { sysId, scopeName, scopeId } of scopeInformation) { if (isSameScope || sysId === tableScopeId) { appName = scopeName; scope = scopeId; } if (isSameScope || sysId === appId) { currSessionScopeName = scopeName; } } } else { sys_scope_gr.get(appId); appName = sys_scope_gr.getValue('name'); scope = sys_scope_gr.getValue('scope'); currSessionScopeName = appName; } /* remoteColumnName", columnDefinition.name, "remoteColumnLabel", columnDefinition.label, "remoteColumnType", columnDefinition.type, "remoteColumnLength", columnDefinition.length, "remoteColumnDigits", columnDefinition.digits, "isRemoteColumnNullable", columnDefinition.nullable));*/ /* const connectionDetails = connectionId ? new ConnectionService().getConnectionById(connectionId) : {}; try { let columns = []; if ((connectionId && remoteSchema && remoteTable)) { const outputObj = schemaMapping.listColumnsInTable(connectionId, remoteSchema, remoteTable); const outputController = new DatafabricOutputController(outputObj); outputController.throwIfErrored(); const resp = outputController.getData(); columns = JSON.parse(resp); } */ //Alectri Simulation. var connectionDetails ={}; var simulatorUtil = new x_snc_alectri_zc_0.ZCCSimulatorUtil(); if (!simulatorUtil.checkIfAlectriConnection(connectionId)) { connectionDetails = connectionId ? new ConnectionService().getConnectionById(connectionId) : {}; } try { let columns = []; if ((connectionId && remoteSchema && remoteTable)) { //Alectri Simulation if (simulatorUtil.checkIfAlectriConnection(connectionId)) { columns = simulatorUtil.fetchTableColumns(remoteTable); } else { const outputObj = schemaMapping.listColumnsInTable(connectionId, remoteSchema, remoteTable); const outputController = new DatafabricOutputController(outputObj); outputController.throwIfErrored(); const resp = outputController.getData(); columns = JSON.parse(resp); } } let data = { connectionDetails, scope: { id: appId, name: appName, scope: scope, currSessionScopeName }, remoteSchema, remoteTable, columns, }; if (dataFabricTableId !== '') { const outputObj = schemaMapping.showRemoteTable(dataFabricTableId); const outputController = new DatafabricOutputController(outputObj); outputController.throwIfErrored(); const dataFabricTable = JSON.parse(outputController.getData()); const { columnMapping, glidePrimaryKeys, glideTableName, glideTableLabel, } = dataFabricTable; const primaryKeys = new Set(glidePrimaryKeys.split(",")); const mappedColumns = {}; columnMapping.forEach(mapped => { mappedColumns[mapped.remoteColumnName] = mapped; }); if (columns.length === 0) { columns = columnMapping.map(column => { const referenceInfo = column.glideColumnType === 'reference' ? { "referenceTable": column.referenceTable, "referenceTableLabel": column.referenceTableLabel, "referenceColumn": column.referenceColumn, "referenceColumnLabel": column.referenceColumnLabel } : {}; return { "glideColumnName": column.glideColumnName, "glideColumnLabel": column.glideColumnLabel, "glideColumnType": column.glideColumnType, "isColumnPrimaryKey": column.isColumnPrimaryKey, "remoteColumnName": (remoteTable) ? column.remoteColumnName : '', "isSelected": true, ...referenceInfo }; }); } else { if (mode === 'change_source') { //with change_source mode, they are not allow to change/add/remove the columns in the target table, only allow to remap columns on the source table columns = columnMapping.map(column => { const remoteColumn = columns.find(col => col.remoteColumnName === column.remoteColumnName); const referenceInfo = column.glideColumnType === 'reference' ? { "referenceTable": column.referenceTable, "referenceTableLabel": column.referenceTableLabel, "referenceColumn": column.referenceColumn, "referenceColumnLabel": column.referenceColumnLabel } : {}; return { ...remoteColumn, "glideColumnName": column.glideColumnName, "glideColumnLabel": column.glideColumnLabel, "glideColumnType": column.glideColumnType, "isColumnPrimaryKey": column.isColumnPrimaryKey, "remoteColumnName": column.remoteColumnName, "isSelected": true, ...referenceInfo }; }); } else { columns.forEach(column => { const mappedColumn = mappedColumns[column.remoteColumnName]; if (mappedColumn) { const compatibleTypes = getCompatibleTypesFor(mappedColumn.glideColumnType); if (!compatibleTypes.find(compatibleType => compatibleType.name === column.remoteColumnType)) { column["glideColumnType"] = mappedColumn.remoteColumnType; } else { column["glideColumnType"] = mappedColumn.glideColumnType; } column["glideColumnName"] = mappedColumn.glideColumnName; column["glideColumnLabel"] = mappedColumn.glideColumnLabel; column["isColumnPrimaryKey"] = mappedColumn.isColumnPrimaryKey; column["isSelected"] = true; if (mappedColumn.glideColumnType === 'reference') { column["referenceTable"] = mappedColumn.referenceTable; column["referenceTableLabel"] = mappedColumn.referenceTableLabel; column["referenceColumn"] = mappedColumn.referenceColumn; column["referenceColumnLabel"] = mappedColumn.referenceColumnLabel; } } }); } } data["dataFabricTableInfo"] = { glideTableName, glideTableLabel, isSameScope }; if (remoteTable) data["dataFabricTableInfo"]["persistedColumnSelection"] = mappedColumns; data["columns"] = columns; } const {compatibleTypes, typeMetadata} = getAllCompatibleColumnTypes(data["columns"]); data["compatibleTypes"] = compatibleTypes; data["typeMetadata"] = typeMetadata; var logo = (data['remoteSchema']!='Redshift Database')?data['remoteSchema'].toLowerCase().split(' ')[0]:'aws-redshift'; //logo var db = new GlideRecord('db_image'); db.addEncodedQuery('active=true^nameLIKE'+logo); db.query(); while(db.next()){ data['connectionDetails']={'logo':db.name+''}; } return data; } catch (error) { throw new sn_ws_err.BadRequestError(String(error.message)); } })(request, response);]]>/api/sn_data_fabric/data_fabric_ui/get-remote-tableapplication/json,application/xml,text/xmlfalse/get-remote-tabletruetruetruesys_ws_operationadmin2025-02-25 06:37:01ebacfc37437f521093098759bbb8f2fd18Get data fabric table15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead615e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6sys_ws_operation_ebacfc37437f521093098759bbb8f2fdgurjot.joshi@snc2026-02-10 10:21:1748e07b5c430f5210920d8759bbb8f2d1ebacfc37437f521093098759bbb8f2fdadmin2025-02-25 06:37:0119ccfc37437f521093098759bbb8f2150admin2025-02-25 06:37:01sys_ws_operation
true

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_470e1bab4353121093098759bbb8f264
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl>01783dcf2720221019ae55225cf6f232</enforce_acl><http_method>POST</http_method><name>Establish Connection</name><operation_script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {
	/**
	 * {
	 *   "result": {
	 *     "status": false,
	 *     "message": "Remote database refresh failed. failed to reserve data fabric engine",
	 *     "exception": {
	 *       "fileName": "sys_ws_operation.470e1bab4353121093098759bbb8f264.operation_script",
	 *       "sourceName": "sys_ws_operation.470e1bab4353121093098759bbb8f264.operation_script",
	 *       "lineNumber": 3,
	 *       "name": "JavaException"
	 *     },
	 *     "additionalDetails": null
	 *   }
	 * }
	 */

const connectionId = String(request.queryParams.connectionId ?? '');

	//Alectri Simulation.
		var simulatorUtil = new x_snc_alectri_zc_0.ZCCSimulatorUtil();
		if(simulatorUtil.checkIfAlectriConnection(connectionId)){
			return simulatorUtil.simulateEstablishConnectionObject();
		}

	var rawResponse = new sn_datafabric.ConnectionManager().refreshRemoteDatabase();
	var response = {
		status: rawResponse.status,
		message: rawResponse.message
	};
	return response;
})(request, response);]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/sn_data_fabric/data_fabric_ui/establish-connection</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/establish-connection</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-01-31 03:20:02</sys_created_on><sys_id>470e1bab4353121093098759bbb8f264</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Establish Connection</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Workflow Data Fabric Hub" source="sn_data_fabric">15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Workflow Data Fabric Hub">15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_470e1bab4353121093098759bbb8f264</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>gurjot.joshi@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-29 14:26:10</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Data Fabric UI">48e07b5c430f5210920d8759bbb8f2d1</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_7d2c75ac27e0221019ae55225cf6f254
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl>f4297d032760221019ae55225cf6f28b</enforce_acl><http_method>GET</http_method><name>Data Fabric Tables</name><operation_script><![CDATA[(function process( /*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {

    function getScopeInformation(sysId) {
        let res = [];
        var sysScopeGR = new GlideRecord('sys_scope');
        sysScopeGR.addQuery('sys_id', sysId);
        sysScopeGR.query();

        if (sysScopeGR.next()) {
            let sysId = sysScopeGR.getValue('sys_id');
            let scopeName = sysScopeGR.getValue('name');
            res.push({
                sysId,
                scopeName
            });
        }
        return res;
    }

    // filter descriptions:
    // name - filter by table name or table label, starts with, case insensitive match
    // createdBy - user_name to filter by, or empty/null
    // onlyApplicationTables - return application tables or all tables
    // connectors - list of sys_id that match against the list of connectors
    // orderDescending - whether to sort ascending (or descending if false).  Sort by table's label
    // start - pagination
    // end - pagination

    try {

        let {
            name,
            createdBy,
            connectors,
            connections,
            order,
            status,
            start,
            end
        } = request.queryParams;

        let filters = {};
        filters["name"] = name ? String(name) : '';
        filters["createdBy"] = (createdBy && String(createdBy) === 'me') ? gs.getUserName() : '';
        filters["onlyApplicationTables"] = false;
        filters["connectors"] = (connectors && String(connectors) !== 'all') ? String(connectors).split(',') : [];
        filters["order"] = String(order);
        filters["status"] = String(status);
        connections = connections? String(connections): 'all';
        if (connections === 'all') {
            filters["connections"] = [];
        } else {
            filters["connections"] = String(connections).split(',');
        }

        const sm = new sn_datafabric.SchemaMapping();
        const outputObj = sm.listAllMappedTables(JSON.stringify(filters), Number(start), Number(end));

        const outputController = new DatafabricOutputController(outputObj);
        outputController.throwIfErrored();

        const currentAppScopeId = gs.getCurrentApplicationId();
		const sessionScopeInfo = getScopeInformation(currentAppScopeId);

        const result = JSON.parse(outputController.getData());

		//Alectri Simulation.
		var simulatorUtil = new x_snc_alectri_zc_0.ZCCSimulatorUtil();
		var arr = JSON.parse(simulatorUtil.fetchAllDFtables());
	
		for(var i=0;i<arr.length;i++){
		result['dataFabricTables'].push(arr[i]);
		}
		result['rowCount'] = result['rowCount'] + parseInt(arr.length);

        return {
            count: result["rowCount"],
            dataFabricTables: result["dataFabricTables"],
            currentSessionScope: sessionScopeInfo
        };

    } catch (error) {
        throw new sn_ws_err.BadRequestError('Data Fabric Hub: Unable to fetch data fabric tables. ' + error.message);
    }
})(request, response);]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/sn_data_fabric/data_fabric_ui/data-fabric-tables</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/data-fabric-tables</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-03-24 16:22:35</sys_created_on><sys_id>7d2c75ac27e0221019ae55225cf6f254</sys_id><sys_mod_count>5</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Data Fabric Tables</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Workflow Data Fabric Hub" source="sn_data_fabric">15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Workflow Data Fabric Hub">15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_7d2c75ac27e0221019ae55225cf6f254</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>gurjot.joshi@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-10 07:06:03</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Data Fabric UI">48e07b5c430f5210920d8759bbb8f2d1</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_47ea8e3643b7121093098759bbb8f2bc
sys_update_xml.payload:
trueapplication/json,application/xml,text/xmlfalsef4297d032760221019ae55225cf6f28bPOSTCreate data fabric table/api/sn_data_fabric/data_fabric_ui/create-remote-tableapplication/json,application/xml,text/xmlfalse/create-remote-tabletruetruetruesys_ws_operationadmin2025-02-22 10:04:4247ea8e3643b7121093098759bbb8f2bc23Create data fabric table15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead615e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6sys_ws_operation_47ea8e3643b7121093098759bbb8f2bcgurjot.joshi@snc2026-01-29 14:26:2548e07b5c430f5210920d8759bbb8f2d147ea8e3643b7121093098759bbb8f2bcadmin2025-02-22 10:04:421e8fca7643b7121093098759bbb8f2350admin2025-02-22 10:04:42sys_ws_operation
true

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_89839bf443e7521093098759bbb8f2e5
sys_update_xml.payload:
trueapplication/json,application/xml,text/xmlfalsef4297d032760221019ae55225cf6f28bGETSchema and Tables/api/sn_data_fabric/data_fabric_ui/schema_tablesapplication/json,application/xml,text/xmlfalse/schema_tablestruetruetruesys_ws_operationadmin2025-02-04 02:38:2989839bf443e7521093098759bbb8f2e52Schema and Tables15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead615e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6sys_ws_operation_89839bf443e7521093098759bbb8f2e5gurjot.joshi@snc2026-01-29 14:27:0148e07b5c430f5210920d8759bbb8f2d189839bf443e7521093098759bbb8f2e5admin2025-02-04 02:38:26a9ccfbf4436b521093098759bbb8f2510admin2025-02-04 02:38:26sys_ws_operation
true

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_4eb43e3653842210419ec8b020e5e626
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl>f4297d032760221019ae55225cf6f28b</enforce_acl><http_method>DELETE</http_method><name>Delete data fabric table</name><operation_script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {

  var pathparams = request.pathParams;  
	var remoteTableId = pathparams.id;
	if(remoteTableId){
		//Alectri Simulation.
		var simulatorUtil = new x_snc_alectri_zc_0.ZCCSimulatorUtil();

		if(simulatorUtil.checkIfAlectriDFtable(remoteTableId)){

		simulatorUtil.dropDFSimulatedTable(remoteTableId);
		
		return {
			status:true,
			message: 'Data Fabric table has been removed'
		};
		}

		var result = new sn_datafabric.ConnectionManager().dropDataFabricRemoteTable(remoteTableId);
		return {
			status:result.status,
			message: result.message
		};
	}
})(request, response);]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/sn_data_fabric/data_fabric_ui/delete-remote-table/{id}</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/delete-remote-table/{id}</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-03-06 23:03:26</sys_created_on><sys_id>4eb43e3653842210419ec8b020e5e626</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Delete data fabric table</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Workflow Data Fabric Hub" source="sn_data_fabric">15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Workflow Data Fabric Hub">15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_4eb43e3653842210419ec8b020e5e626</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>gurjot.joshi@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-29 14:26:36</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Data Fabric UI">48e07b5c430f5210920d8759bbb8f2d1</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_c180fae74313521093098759bbb8f29c
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl>01783dcf2720221019ae55225cf6f232</enforce_acl><http_method>POST</http_method><name>Test And Save Connection</name><operation_script><![CDATA[(function process( /*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {

    /**
     * {
     *   "result": {
     *     "status": true,
     *     "message": "Connection details successfully verified and saved.",
     *     "Exception": "Connection details successfully verified and saved."
     *   }
     * }
     */
    /**
     * {
     *   "result": {
     *     "additionalDetails": {
     *       "connectionId": "a54b9822dbbf1210ffa74cae16961968"
     *     },
     *     "status": true,
     *     "message": "Connection details successfully verified and saved."
     *   }
     * }
     */

    function getQueryParam(queryParams, key) {
        let param = queryParams[key];
        if (Array.isArray(param))
            return param[0];
        return param;
    }

    const data = request.body.data;
    const connectionSysId = data.connection_sys_id;
    const isTestConnectionOnly = getQueryParam(request.queryParams, 'isTestConnectionOnly') == 'true';
    const connectionStatus = getQueryParam(request.queryParams, 'connectionStatus');


	//Alectri Simulation.
    var simulatorUtil = new x_snc_alectri_zc_0.ZCCSimulatorUtil();
    if (simulatorUtil.checkIfAlectriConnection(connectionSysId)) {
        return simulatorUtil.simulateTestConnectionObject(connectionSysId);
    }



    let connectionManager = new sn_datafabric.ConnectionManager();
    let payload;
    try {
        payload = isTestConnectionOnly ? JSON.stringify({
            connection_sys_id: connectionSysId
        }) : JSON.stringify(data);
    } catch (e) {
        return {
            status: false,
            message: "Bad parsing"
        };
    }

    let rawResponse = isTestConnectionOnly ? connectionManager.testConnection(payload) : connectionManager.testAndSaveConnection(payload);
    //ignore Exception from response for now, since it's in valid JSON format.
    if (connectionStatus && connectionStatus.toString() === 'DEACTIVATED' && rawResponse.status) {
        rawResponse = connectionManager.activateConnection(connectionSysId);
        rawResponse.additionalDetails = {
            connectionId: connectionSysId
        };
    }
    var response = {
        additionalDetails: rawResponse.additionalDetails,
        status: rawResponse.status,
        message: rawResponse.message
    };
    return response;

})(request, response);]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/sn_data_fabric/data_fabric_ui/test-connection</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/test-connection</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-01-30 23:56:26</sys_created_on><sys_id>c180fae74313521093098759bbb8f29c</sys_id><sys_mod_count>5</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Test And Save Connection</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Workflow Data Fabric Hub" source="sn_data_fabric">15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Workflow Data Fabric Hub">15e007190f2ca3a07fd9186f8ad8ead6</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_c180fae74313521093098759bbb8f29c</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>gurjot.joshi@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-29 14:27:11</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Data Fabric UI">48e07b5c430f5210920d8759bbb8f2d1</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>
